trendingNews.title: Gemini 3.5 Suite Launches with Deep Multi-Agent Workflows
trendingNews.summary: Google introduces Gemini 3.5 Flash and Pro Preview, establishing new benchmarks in speed, reasoning, and multi-agent interactions with built-in grounding.
trendingNews.impact: Enables developers to orchestrate multiple sub-agents synchronously with near-zero latency, accelerating the transition from simple assistants to full-stack agents.

trendingNews.title: Claude Code Released as a Powerful CLI Agent for Complex Refactoring
trendingNews.summary: Anthropic launches Claude Code, an agentic terminal command-line interface that allows engineers to complete multi-file edits, write tests, and debug errors.
trendingNews.impact: Shifts software development from auto-completion prompts to high-agency engineering companions executing entire pipelines safely.

trendingNews.title: Apple Intelligence Seamlessly Integrates Deeper On-Device Context Models
trendingNews.summary: Apple ships fully on-device instruction-tuned models with private cloud compute, bringing low-latency context reasoning to everyday mobile notifications and actions.
trendingNews.impact: Prioritizes user privacy for personal telemetry and daily workflows, demonstrating a hybrid local-plus-cloud orchestration model.

innovations.title: Unified Multimodal Audio-Visual Streams with Live API
innovations.description: Standardized real-time 16-bit PCM streaming allows applications to read and write audio-visual elements dynamically with under 400ms roundtrip latency.
highlights: Direct audio-in and audio-out stream mapping without pipeline text conversion
Low-latency speech translation supporting over 40 languages
Synchronized image analysis at 1 frame-per-second intervals

innovations.title: Self-Repairing Code Compilers and Sandbox Environments
innovations.description: New execution-first agents compile software inside secure browser-based sandboxes, automatically reading compiler trace logs to resolve dependencies.
highlights: Eliminates dependency mismatches by automatically checking package.json
Pre-emptively corrects type errors during the build phase
Bypasses classic syntax errors through continuous code refactoring loops

ideas.title: Real-time Meeting Coach & Active Agenda Copilot
ideas.concept: A live microphone agent that connects to a virtual meeting, tracks key spoken topics, and cross-references them with the meeting agenda to surface pacing tips.
ideas.howToBuild: Build an Express web server that processes live audio streams, uses Gemini 3.1 Live API to transcribe and analyze the discussion, and sends pacing recommendations via Server-Sent Events.

ideas.title: AI-Powered SEO Landing Page Generator & Enhancer
ideas.concept: An automated compiler that reads a product description, automatically researches high-ranking competitor terms, and writes optimized React components.
ideas.howToBuild: Create a Vite React interface connected to a backend using Gemini 3.5 with Search Grounding. The backend generates structured copy, selects appropriate layouts, and outputs standard Tailwind code.
